symbols.name: conical buoy,gw,full-chart

provenance.reference_role: S-57 COLPAT1,2 and OpenCPN witness require mixed horizontal/vertical stripe semantics

symbols.required_change: Redraw BOYCON81 against the OpenCPN/reference witness so the blue-red-white-blue horizontal/vertical stripe pattern is unambiguous; include the vertical blue element rather than a purely horizontal band stack.

semantic_brief.brief: BOYCON81 is conical buoy,gw,full-chart. It is used as a special-purpose buoy used for named local purposes. Required geometry: conical/nun buoy body. Required colours: blue, red, white, blue with horizontal bands/stripes in the listed colour order; vertical bands/stripes in the listed colour order.
semantic_brief.colour_pattern: horizontal bands/stripes in the listed colour order; vertical bands/stripes in the listed colour order
safety_invariants: Preserve the S-57/S-52 symbol class; do not substitute a different buoy/beacon/topmark/hazard family.
Preserve load-bearing colours and colour order.
Preserve topmark count/orientation and band pattern when present.
Use provider images as semantic/shape witnesses; Helm output remains generated-owned artwork.
Conical/nun buoy rows must not be rendered as can/cylindrical buoy rows.
semantic_brief.use_case: special-purpose buoy used for named local purposes

opencpn_render.label: conical buoy,gw,full-chart
opencpn_render.license_boundary: GPL/OpenCPN local visual oracle; reference only, do not copy pixels
